programmes.show_description: Leave It To Nevus. With pandemic safety protocols in place, Dr. Lee reopens her office. Patients include Monica, who has a large birthmark growing on the side of her face. S3, Ep1
Big Pop On Campus. Dr. Lee treats Reginald, who has a rare growth on the back of his head. Che'Re has a prominent bump on her face, and Juan has painful boils on his neck. S3, Ep2
Alicia's Story. A devoted girlfriend, Alicia is all smiles on the outside. But inside, she is terrified her addiction to food will kill her before she can marry. S6, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Overcoming Obstacles. Having beaten ovarian cancer, bride Gemma wants the perfect gown for her wedding in Thailand. Plus, Emma seeks a figure hugging dress after losing four stone! S1, Ep37

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: More Is More! Lisa longs for a princess ball gown with a big bow, and Kate wants a dress with lace, a long train, a big veil, and lots of bling. Can David and the team help? S1, Ep38

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Dressed By Committee. A wedding is a family event, but should they decide on the dress? Nicola wants a timeless gown but her mum and Nan want her to wear one of their frocks! S1, Ep39

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: Entourage Overload. Bride Kara brings her Nan as she values her opinion on a dress, but Nan likes a fitted gown she isn't sure of. Yasmin falls in love with a dress, but does mum? S1, Ep40
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
'57 Chevy Bel Air. While Molly's trying to save money for their wedding, Mike is lured into buying Vince's 1957 Chevy Bel Air - without telling her first. S2, Ep4
Victoria Runs Away. Despite Mike's good intentions, he adds fuel to the fire when he finds himself caught in the middle of a fight between Molly and her family. S2, Ep5
Happy Halloween. Mike's spooked when Molly's boss invites them to a party on Halloween, a holiday he dreads. S2, Ep6
Hobbitses, Physicses. Sheldon's obsession with The Lord of the Rings leads to an unhealthy habit. Missy asks her dad to teach her how to play catch. S3, Ep4
Pineapple And Male Friendship. After being released from the psychiatric hospital, Dr. Sturgis unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw. S3, Ep5
A Parasol And A Hell Of An Arm. A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Meanwhile, Meemaw struggles after her breakup with Dr. Sturgis. S3, Ep6
The Hofstadter Insufficiency. Leonard is away at sea, so Sheldon and Penny spend time together and spill some revealing secrets. Howard comes to Raj's aid after a breakup. S7, Ep1
The Deception Verification. Leonard returns from his expedition and finds things chilly between him and Sheldon, and Howard faces questions about his masculinity. S7, Ep2
The Scavenger Vortex. Raj puts together a scientific scavenger hunt that turns into serious, cutthroat competition that brings out the best - and the worst - in the gang. S7, Ep3
The Raiders Minimization. Amy ruins one of Sheldon's favourite films. Leonard discovers how to get Penny to do his bidding. Raj and Stuart get creative with dating profiles. S7, Ep4
The Workplace Proximity. Amy takes a job at Sheldon's university, putting their relationship to the test. Howard ends up sleeping on Raj's couch after a fight with Bernadette. S7, Ep5
The Romance Resonance. Sheldon fears his major scientific breakthrough may haunt him for the rest of his career. Howard makes a grand romantic gesture to Bernadette. S7, Ep6
The Proton Displacement. When Sheldon's childhood hero, Professor Proton, seeks Leonard's help with an experiment, Sheldon decides to befriend another TV science guy. S7, Ep7
The Itchy Brain Simulation. Leonard fails to stop Sheldon from overreacting after a past slight comes to light, and Penny has a run-in with Raj's former girlfriend Lucy. S7, Ep8
Carl Meets A Lady. Carl tries to make a love connection and get a date with an attractive woman who's clearly out of his league. S2, Ep7
Peggy Gets A Job. When Mike encourages his mum, Peggy, to get a job, he never imagines how it will interfere with Molly's life. S2, Ep8
Mike Cheats. Mike's been cheating, but not on Molly! As Thanksgiving Day approaches, he starts cheating on his diet and hiding it from her. S2, Ep9
Pongo Pygmaeus And Spitting. Sheldon starts the first internet flame war, and Meemaw is unhappy when George spends time with her new boyfriend. S3, Ep7
The Sin Of Greed. The university tries to recruit Sheldon, through George. Georgie gets a job working for Meemaw's new boyfriend. Mary decides to rid her home of greed. S3, Ep8
A Party Invitation, Football. Mary gets Pastor Jeff involved when Sheldon isn't invited to Billy's birthday party. George, meanwhile, has 'male-bonding time' with Dr. Sturgis. S3, Ep9
The Thanksgiving Decoupling. Howard's mother has a say when he and Bernadette host Thanksgiving dinner for the gang. Penny and Leonard must deal with a mistake from her past. S7, Ep9
The Discovery Dissipation. Amy and Leonard try to help Sheldon when his accidental scientific discovery is disproved. Howard and Bernadette open their home to Raj for a week. S7, Ep10
The Cooper Extraction. With Sheldon in Texas, the gang decorates for Christmas, and they each contemplate if they would have had a wonderful life if they'd never met him. S7, Ep11
The Hesitation Ramification. Penny turns to Leonard after her guest appearance doesn't turn out well. Sheldon works on his sense of humour, and Raj practices talking to girls. S7, Ep12
The Occupation Recalibration. Penny makes a big step toward pursuing a full-time acting career, and Sheldon is forced to take a vacation. S7, Ep13
The Convention Conundrum. Unable to score tickets for Comic-Con, Sheldon decides to stage his own comic-book convention, while the ladies attempt to act like grown-ups. S7, Ep14
The Locomotive Manipulation. Amy talks Sheldon into a romantic Valentine's Day getaway to Napa Valley. Leonard and Penny make an emergency visit to the vet with Raj's dog. S7, Ep15
The Table Polarization. Leonard's purchase of a new dining room table doesn't sit well with Sheldon, and Bernadette isn't happy about Howard taking another trip to space. S7, Ep16

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Senior Cyst-izen. Anthony's thigh lump blocks his fresh start, while Mary's 70-year-old bump shocks doctors. Plus, Sultana's rash threatens her success and confidence. S1, Ep5

programmes.show_name: New: Dr Pimple Popper: Breaking Out
programmes.show_description: Jaw Dropper. Dr. Lee and Lyndsey help David with a jaw lump and Carla's bulge raises concern. James wants 70 skin tags removed so he is ready for beach season. S1, Ep6
Raw Meat Mass. Margarita is a matriarch who has been hiding her armpit lump from her family. Bradley has a concerning growth that looks like raw meat on his leg. S4, Ep3
Cystic River. Dennis has several giant growths on his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps. S3, Ep3
Don't Sweat It! Audrey pops the painful bumps on her body so she can feel relief. Krista's excessive sweating is so severe that she could fill up an entire milk jug with her sweat. S3, Ep4
Liz's Story. Liz is bed-bound with severe lymphedema making it impossible to walk. She's isolated and lives with her mum who is too ill to care for her. S6, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Fiancé Show. Reality TV star Olivia Buckland wants a dress to match her fab figure and big personality. Meanwhile, two fiancés try to influence what frocks their brides choose. S2, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Sexy Show. Here comes the bride - and she is looking hot! Sacha wants to go 'full stripper' on her wedding day, and Lell wants her assets on show for her Ibiza beach wedding. S2, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Expect The Unexpected Show. Alternative model Cervena is covered in tattoos, but falls for a traditional ballgown. Bride Charlotte has a surprise accessory to her wedding look. S2, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Say Yes to the Dress UK
programmes.show_description: The Feeling Is Believing Show. From stressed, depressed and pressed for perfection, three brides-to-be seek their dream dresses, including one who's been a bridesmaid 31 times! S2, Ep5

Molly Needs A Number. When Molly is overwhelmed with Thanksgiving preparations and wedding planning, she asks Mike to help, with mixed results. S2, Ep10
Christmas Break. When Molly gets disappointing news at work, she is thrown into a funk that threatens to ruin Christmas. S2, Ep11
Victoria Can't Drive. When Victoria is arrested for various driving violations, Molly and Joyce ask Mike to help spring her from jail. S2, Ep13
Teenager Soup. Sheldon fakes being sick to avoid a swim test at school. Meanwhile, Dr. Sturgis spies on Meemaw's new boyfriend. S3, Ep10
A Live Chicken. George and Meemaw struggle to manage the Cooper household while Mary plans Pastor Jeff's wedding. S3, Ep11
Body Glitter, Mall Safety Kit. Sheldon catches a struggling Paige shoplifting. Meanwhile, George Sr. is furious when Georgie tries to buy his way out of chores. S3, Ep12
The Friendship Turbulence. Things turn rocky between Sheldon and Wolowitz, and Bernadette steps in to mediate. Penny is offered a movie role that may prove embarrassing. S7, Ep17
The Mommy Observation. Sheldon's visit to see his mummy forces him to start addressing a new reality. The gang speculate about where they might be in 20 years. S7, Ep18
The Indecision Amalgamation. Raj wrestles with dating two women at the same time, Penny is offered a part in a trashy movie, and Sheldon can't decide between two gaming systems. S7, Ep19
The Relationship Diremption. Raj and Howard double-date, and the latter is flushed with embarrassment after Raj's girlfriend reveals a secret she knows about Howard. S7, Ep20
Anything Can Happen Recurrence. Leonard reinstates Anything Can Happen Thursday, and Sheldon attempts something spontaneous. Raj requests help from Howard in prepping for a date. S7, Ep21
The Proton Transmogrification. Sheldon receives counselling from his childhood TV idol, while Penny and Leonard reach a relationship milestone and turn it into a competition. S7, Ep22
The Gorilla Dissolution. A trying day at the movie shoot makes Penny question her life choices. Caring for a bedridden Mrs. Wolowitz is a challenge for Howard and Bernadette. S7, Ep23
The Status Quo Combustion. Sheldon gets caught up in all the life-altering changes going on around him and considers a monumental move. Raj and Emily take it to the next level. S7, Ep24
The Art Of Micro-Cheating. Jamal and Josh take Kim for a new look. Cortney is in shambles when she finds out Colt's secret. Sophie and Liz's friendship hits a boiling point. S5, Ep5
You Need To Shut Up. Meri ventures into the wild world of dating apps, and Kody struggles to fake it about the new family dynamic, as he and Robyn pack up their home. S13, Ep4
